appraise.name: Appraise
appraise.description: You can show lost relics you've found to Professor Tangrowth, who will appraise them for you

build.name: Build
build.description: Pokemon with the Build specialty will lead your building projects

bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
bulldoze.description: Pokemon with the Bulldoze specialty can lead your demolition, rebuilding or relocation projects

burn.name: Burn
burn.description: Pokemon with the Burn specialty can set fire to Flammable objects. They can also turn Squish clay into Brick

chop.name: Chop
chop.description: Pokemon with the Chop specialty can process small logs into lumber

collect.name: Collect
collect.description: Pokemon with the Collect specialty will trade you rare things for certain items

crush.name: Crush
crush.description: Pokemon with the Crush specialty can mash materials into different things

dj.name: DJ
dj.description: DJ Rotom can use the DJ specialty to play music CDs for you

dreamisland.name: Dream Island
dreamisland.description: Pokemon with the Dream Island specialty can transport you to a Dream Island

eat.name: Eat
eat.description: Mosslax has the Eat specialty. Something good may happen if you offer them food

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.description: Tinkmaster has the Engineer specialty and can lead huge building projects

explode.name: Explode
explode.description: Pokemon with the Explode specialty can be fired out of a cannon, destroying everything around them on impact

fly.name: Fly
fly.description: Pokemon with the Fly spceialty can fly you to a Pokemon you're searching fo

gather.name: Gather
gather.description: Pokemon with the Gather specialty will pick up items on the ground and put them inside a community box

gatherhoney.name: Gather Honey
gatherhoney.description: Pokemon with the Gather Honey specialty will give you special furniture if you bring them honey

generate.name: Generate
generate.description: Pokemon with the Generate specialty can power machines with electricty

grow.name: Grow
grow.description: Pokemon with the Grow specialty can make plants grow faster

hype.name: Hype
hype.description: Pokemon with the Hype specialty will start dancing when they hear music, improving the mood

illuminate.name: Illuminate
illuminate.description: Peakychu can use the Illuminate specialty to light up the whole town for you

litter.name: Litter
litter.description: Pokemon with the Litter specialty will drop useful materials near their homes

paint.name: Paint
paint.description: Smearguru has the Paint specialty and can recolor certain items, such as furniture

party.name: Party
party.description: Chef Dente can use the Party specialty to help you prepare food for parties

rarify.name: Rarify
rarify.description: Pokemon with the Rarify specialty can turn Star Pieces into rare Pokemetal

recycle.name: Recycle
recycle.description: Pokemon with the Recycle specialty can process nonburnable garbage into iron ore and wastepaper into paper

search.name: Search
search.description: Pokemon with the Search specialty can help you find buried items

storage.name: Storage
storage.description: Pokémon with the Storage specialty can hold on to your items for you

teleport.name: Teleport
teleport.description: Pokemon with the Teleport specialty can instantly take you to a Pokemon you're searching for

trade.name: Trade
trade.description: Pokemon with the Trade speicalty can exchange items with you at a cash register

transform.name: Transform
transform.description: Ditto can improve its moves by using Transform

water.name: Water
water.description: Pokemon with the Water specialty can use a full water basin to spray water on nearby fields and plants

yawn.name: Yawn
yawn.description: Pokemon with the Yawn specialty can tell you how humid it is
